commands.review_summary:
The PR scopes Matrix room history and read actions by native Matrix thread, changes thread send/edit relation payloads, and updates Matrix docs, changelog, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main and v2026.5.7 read Matrix rooms flat and always emit fallback thread reply metadata, while the PR head can be checked directly against the Matrix v1.14 relations/threading contract. The supplied live output reproduces the direct Matrix/Synapse thread-read and reply-shape behavior, but not the final indirect-relation path.
